name: Best in the West (Houston) Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the eggs slightly.
2. Add the pumpkin, brown sugar, sugar, cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, and salt to the bowl. Mix well.
3. Stir in the milk and whipping cream until combined.
4. Place the unbaked pie shell on an oven rack.
5. Pour the pumpkin filling into the pie shell.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 60 to 70 minutes or until set.
7. Allow the pie to cool on a rack.
8. Just before serving, decorate with whipped topping.
Note: This recipe was originally found in the Houston Chronicle. It has been shared with friends and neighbors who all agree it is the best pumpkin pie ever made.
